hero.title:
From Peru's fields
to the world
hero.subtitle:
Export-grade legumes and agricultural products
with certified quality — FDA · SENASA · HACCP

about.title: Connecting Peru's agricultural richness with the world
about.description: Business Beans Perú was founded with the mission of bringing the best of Peruvian agriculture to national and international markets. We specialize in the selection, processing, and export of high-quality legumes, operating under the strictest food safety standards.
features: FDA, SENASA, and HACCP certified processes
Full traceability from field to destination

products.title: Peruvian export-grade legumes
products.subtitle: Selected under the highest quality standards for demanding markets

certifications.title: Certified to export to the world

fda.name: FDA
fda.description: Food and Drug Administration — Authorization to export to the United States

senasa.name: SENASA
senasa.description: National Agricultural Health Service — Peruvian phytosanitary certification

haccp.name: HACCP
haccp.description: Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points — Guaranteed food safety

finalCta.title: Ready to import Peruvian quality?
finalCta.subtitle: Contact us today and receive detailed information about our products, certifications, and export terms.

hero.title:
We bring Peru's finest
agriculture to the world
hero.subtitle: We are a Peruvian company committed to quality, sustainability, and the development of the national agro-export sector.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To establish ourselves as a leading company in the trade and export of Peruvian legumes and agricultural products, with presence in key international markets, distinguished by product quality, process innovation, and sustainability commitment.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To connect Peru's agricultural wealth with national and international markets, offering high-quality legumes and agro-industrial products that meet standards of trust, efficiency, and sustainability, strengthening solid commercial relationships and generating value for clients, producers, and strategic allies.

quality.name: Quality
quality.description: We select only the finest grains under strict quality control protocols at every stage of the process.

trust.name: Trust
trust.description: We build lasting commercial relationships based on transparency, compliance, and honesty.

sustainability.name: Sustainability
sustainability.description: We work with responsible producers and promote agricultural practices that care for the environment.

innovation.name: Innovation
innovation.description: We incorporate advanced selection technology to ensure product uniformity, cleanliness, and traceability.

efficiency.name: Efficiency
efficiency.description: We optimize every process from selection to shipment to meet international deadlines and standards.

commitment.name: Commitment
commitment.description: We are committed to our clients' success and the development of Peruvian agriculture.

selection.name: Selection
selection.description: We identify and evaluate the best agricultural lots in the country, working directly with certified producers.

processing.name: Processing
processing.description: We process the grain with state-of-the-art sorting machinery, removing imperfections and ensuring uniform calibers.

certification.name: Certification
certification.description: We verify compliance with all phytosanitary and food safety standards: FDA, SENASA, HACCP.

export.name: Export
export.description: We manage complete international logistics: documentation, traceability, and shipment to destination markets.

commitment.quote: We believe quality is not a destination, but the starting point of every shipment that leaves Peru for the world.

hero.title:
Peruvian legumes
for the world
hero.subtitle: Exportable products with international certification, guaranteed seasonal availability, and precise tariff headings.

frejol-adzuki.name: Adzuki Bean
frejol-adzuki.shortDescription: Glossy dark-red grain highly demanded in Asian markets for confectionery and sweet pastes.
frejol-adzuki.description: The Adzuki bean variety (Vigna angularis) is characterized by its glossy dark red grain with a distinctive white ridge, slightly sweet flavor, and is highly demanded by Asian markets for confectionery and sweet pastes. The commercial grading is 4 mm in diameter, quality grade 1+1+3, with 12–15% moisture, electronically sorted and insect-free.
frejol-adzuki.packaging: Machine-sewn polypropylene bags, 25 kg and 50 kg presentations

frejol-bayo.name: Bayo Bean
frejol-bayo.shortDescription: Beige to light brown grain, ideal for stews and soups. Well accepted in domestic and international markets.
frejol-bayo.description: The Bayo bean variety (Phaseolus vulgaris L.), a bush-type bean, is characterized by its beige to light brown grain, good water absorption and flavor retention during cooking, and acceptance in domestic and international markets demanding traditional legumes for stews and soups.
frejol-bayo.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

frejol-caballero.name: Redondo Bean
frejol-caballero.shortDescription: High in protein, carbohydrates and fiber. Grown on the northern coast and inter-Andean valleys of Peru.
frejol-caballero.description: High in protein, carbohydrates, fiber, minerals and vitamins. Grown on the northern coast and inter-Andean valleys of Peru.
frejol-caballero.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

frejol-calima.name: Calima Bean
frejol-calima.shortDescription: Highly sought after for its grain size, physical appearance and excellent cooking quality.
frejol-calima.description: The Calima bean variety (Phaseolus vulgaris L.), a bush-type bean, is highly appreciated by buyers due to its grain size, physical appearance, and excellent cooking quality.
frejol-calima.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

frijol-canario.name: Canary Bean
frijol-canario.shortDescription: Yellow beans with characteristic flavor and aroma, rich in proteins, carbohydrates and minerals.
frijol-canario.description: Yellow beans with distinctive color, whole dry oval-shaped grains, offering a characteristic flavor and aroma, free from foreign matter. A natural food source rich in essential nutrients such as proteins, carbohydrates, and minerals.
frijol-canario.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

frijol-castilla.name: Black-Eyed Bean
frijol-castilla.shortDescription: The most important commercial class of Caupi. Naturally rich in minerals, protein and carbohydrates.
frijol-castilla.description: Also known as Castilla beans, this is the most important commercial class of Caupi. Naturally rich in minerals, protein and carbohydrates, and easy to digest. Primarily produced for export.
frijol-castilla.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

frejol-palo-seco.name: Pigeon Peas
frejol-palo-seco.shortDescription: Native Peruvian grain, oval light-brown. High in protein, carbohydrates and minerals.
frejol-palo-seco.description: Native to Peru, grown on the northern and central coast. Oval-shaped light-brown grain with irregular spots, soft texture and pleasant flavor. High in proteins, carbohydrates and minerals. Also processed for canned and frozen export when green.
frejol-palo-seco.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

habas-secas.name: Dry Fava Beans
habas-secas.shortDescription: Rich in nutrients, fiber and B-group vitamins. Flat oval beans with tender, flavorful flesh.
habas-secas.description: Nutrient- and fiber-rich with B-group vitamins. Their high magnesium content may support nervous system function and blood clotting. Flat oval green beans with tender, flavorful flesh suitable for a wide variety of recipes.
habas-secas.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

frejol-loctao.name: Mung Bean
frejol-loctao.shortDescription: One of the legumes with the highest protein content and best yield. Produced on Peru's northern coast.
frejol-loctao.description: Produced on Peru's northern coast. One of the legumes with the highest protein content and best yield among beans.
frejol-loctao.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

frejol-negro.name: Black Bean (Karaota)
frejol-negro.shortDescription: Among the highest in antioxidants of all legumes. Rich in magnesium, potassium and iron.
frejol-negro.description: Originating in pre-Columbian Peru. Among the highest in antioxidants of all legumes. A nutritious food rich in magnesium and a good source of potassium and iron.
frejol-negro.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

frejol-panamito.name: Navy Bean
frejol-panamito.shortDescription: Specialty bean from Peru's northern highlands. Rich in fiber, potassium and vitamin B9. Cholesterol-free.
frejol-panamito.description: One of the specialty beans from the northern highlands of Peru. Rich in minerals, potassium, fiber and plant protein, with a high content of vitamin B9. Naturally cholesterol-free.
frejol-panamito.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

pallar-baby.name: Baby Lima Bean
pallar-baby.shortDescription: Legume of great nutritional value, high in protein, carbohydrates, fiber, minerals and vitamins.
pallar-baby.description: A legume of great nutritional value, high in protein, carbohydrates, fiber, minerals and vitamins with a pleasant taste.
pallar-baby.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

pallar-grande.name: Large Lima Bean
pallar-grande.shortDescription: Creamy white kidney-shaped beans. Helps control cholesterol. High demand in local and international markets.
pallar-grande.description: Creamy white, flattened kidney-shaped beans with a very pleasant taste. Their components help reduce lipids and cholesterol absorption in the intestine, driving high demand in local and international markets.
pallar-grande.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

frejol-rojo-claro.name: Light Red Kidney Bean
frejol-rojo-claro.shortDescription: High in protein, fiber and B-complex vitamins. Produced in Peru's inter-Andean valleys.
frejol-rojo-claro.description: Produced in the inter-Andean valleys of Peru. High in protein, carbohydrates, fiber, B-complex vitamins (niacin, riboflavin, folic acid, thiamine) and minerals such as iron, zinc, potassium and magnesium.
frejol-rojo-claro.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

frejol-rojo-oscuro.name: Dark Red Kidney Bean
frejol-rojo-oscuro.shortDescription: Excellent source of protein, fiber and minerals. Cultivated in Peru's inter-Andean valleys.
frejol-rojo-oscuro.description: Cultivated in the inter-Andean valleys of Peru. Excellent source of protein, carbohydrates, fiber and minerals including iron, copper, zinc, phosphorus, potassium, magnesium and calcium.
frejol-rojo-oscuro.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

garbanzo.name: Chickpea
garbanzo.shortDescription: Cream to beige grain with firm texture. High international demand for its culinary versatility and nutritional profile.
garbanzo.description: The Chickpea variety (Cicer arietinum L.), desi or kabuli type depending on the cultivar, is characterized by its cream-to-beige grain, firm texture, and strong demand in international markets that value its culinary versatility and protein- and fiber-rich nutritional profile.
garbanzo.calibre: 38–44 grains per ounce (kabuli; approx. 80–95 grains per 100 grams)
garbanzo.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

frejol-zarandaja.name: Val Bean
frejol-zarandaja.shortDescription: Cream-colored elliptical grain with a pronounced white hilum. Produced on Peru's northern coast under strict controls.
frejol-zarandaja.description: Cream-colored elliptical grain with a pronounced white hilum covering one-third of the seed's perimeter, slightly flattened. High in protein, carbohydrates and minerals. Produced on Peru's northern coast under strict quality and sanitary control — harvested, disinfected, classified, calibrated and packed for export.
frejol-zarandaja.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

canihua.name: Kañiwua
canihua.shortDescription: Andean grain free of gluten and saponins, rich in protein, iron and calcium. Grown above 3,800 m.a.s.l.
canihua.description: Andean grain (Chenopodium pallidicaule) of high nutritional value, rich in protein, iron, calcium and fiber, gluten-free and saponin-free. Grown in the high-Andean areas of the Peruvian altiplano (Puno), at altitudes above 3,800 meters above sea level, where other crops cannot survive due to frost.
canihua.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

chocho-tarwi.name: Andean Lupin
chocho-tarwi.shortDescription: Ancestral Andean legume with 41–51% protein content. Gluten-free, rich in essential amino acids.
chocho-tarwi.description: The Chocho or Tarwi variety (Lupinus mutabilis Sweet), an ancestral Andean legume, stands out for its high protein content (41–51%), culinary versatility, and growing demand in markets seeking nutritious, gluten-free, plant-based alternatives rich in essential amino acids such as lysine.
chocho-tarwi.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags, or 1 MT big bags as requested

kiwicha.name: Kiwicha (Amaranth)
kiwicha.shortDescription: Native Peruvian Andean grain. 13% protein with complete amino acid profile. Free of saponins and alkaloids.
kiwicha.description: High in protein (13% average) with a complete essential amino acid profile, especially lysine. Native Andean grain grown in Peru between 1,000 and 3,200 meters above sea level, free of saponins and alkaloids.
kiwicha.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

maca-harina.name: Maca Powder
maca-harina.shortDescription: Dried maca root flour with adaptogenic and energizing properties. High in amino acids, calcium, iron and zinc.
maca-harina.description: Product obtained from milling dried maca root, preserving its adaptogenic, energizing and restorative properties, as well as its high content of amino acids, minerals (calcium, iron, zinc) and complex carbohydrates. Processed from roots grown in the high plateaus of the Peruvian highlands (Junín, Pasco, Huancavelica).
maca-harina.calibre: To be confirmed with supplier (particle size)
maca-harina.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

maiz-gigante-cusco.name: Giant Cusco Corn
maiz-gigante-cusco.shortDescription: Highly energetic cereal from the Inca's sacred valleys. Exceptional kernels, rich in vitamins A, B and E.
maiz-gigante-cusco.description: Cultivated in the sacred valleys of the Incas in Urubamba. Highly energetic cereal, rich in digestible nutrients, protein, minerals (calcium, iron, phosphorus) and vitamins A, B and E. A good source of complex carbohydrates, consumed as cereals, flour and snacks.
maiz-gigante-cusco.calibre: Extra: 22–24 kernels/oz | First: 24–27 kernels/oz | Second: 28–38 kernels/oz
maiz-gigante-cusco.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

quinua-blanca.name: White Quinoa
quinua-blanca.shortDescription: Ancestral Andean grain, gluten-free, with complete proteins, fiber and minerals. Grown in Peru's highlands.
quinua-blanca.description: High in protein (with a complete essential amino acid profile), fiber, minerals (iron, magnesium) and vitamins. An ancestral Andean grain, gluten-free, mainly grown in the high-Andean regions of Peru (Puno, Junín, Ayacucho, Arequipa).
quinua-blanca.calibre: 1.5–1.9 mm / 2.0–2.5 mm (two size grades depending on presentation)
quinua-blanca.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

quinua-roja.name: Red Quinoa
quinua-roja.shortDescription: Red Peruvian quinoa variety, gluten-free, with complete proteins and outstanding mineral profile.
quinua-roja.description: High in protein (with a complete essential amino acid profile), fiber, minerals (iron, magnesium) and vitamins. An ancestral Andean grain, gluten-free, mainly grown in the high-Andean regions of Peru (Puno, Junín, Ayacucho, Arequipa).
quinua-roja.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

quinua-negra.name: Black Quinoa
quinua-negra.shortDescription: Black Peruvian quinoa variety, gluten-free, with complete proteins and high antioxidant power.
quinua-negra.description: High in protein (with a complete essential amino acid profile), fiber, minerals (iron, magnesium) and vitamins. An ancestral Andean grain, gluten-free, mainly grown in the high-Andean regions of Peru (Puno, Junín, Ayacucho, Arequipa).
quinua-negra.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

ajonjoli.name: Sesame Grain
ajonjoli.shortDescription: Uniform seed size, high oil content and excellent nutritional quality. Highly sought after by international buyers.
ajonjoli.description: The Sesame seed variety (Sesamum indicum L.), an herbaceous-type plant, stands out for its uniform seed size, high oil content, and excellent nutritional quality, making it highly sought after by buyers.
ajonjoli.packaging: 25 kg and 50 kg polypropylene bags or as requested

catalog.title: Looking for detailed technical specifications?
catalog.subtitle: Download our complete export catalog in PDF with technical sheets, certifications, and commercial terms.

hero.title:
Our products reach
15+ countries
hero.subtitle: From Lima, we connect Peruvian production with importers and distributors worldwide.

regions.title: A trade network present across four continents

institutional.title: Aligned with Peru's export promotion
institutional.description: Business Beans Perú operates in alignment with the export promotion objectives driven by PROMPERÚ and MINCETUR, contributing to increasing the international visibility of Peru's exports and strengthening agro-export sector competitiveness.

testimonials.title: Our clients' trust is our greatest reference

items.text: Business Beans has supplied us with excellent quality Canary Beans for three consecutive seasons. The consistency in grain caliber and cleanliness is remarkable.
items.name: Importadora del Sur

items.text: Export documentation always arrives complete and on time. The logistics process with Business Beans is efficient and seamless.
items.name: Pacific Trade Co.

items.text: The Giant Cusco Corn we import from Business Beans is the highest-turnover product in our gourmet line. Unmatched Peruvian quality.
items.name: Gourmet Imports USA

hero.title: Let's talk business
hero.subtitle: Fill out the form and our commercial team will respond within 24 hours.

form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your requirement: estimated volume, frequency, destination market...
form.success: Request sent! Our commercial team will contact you soon.
form.error: Error sending request. Please try again.

footer.description: Peruvian agro-export company specializing in the selection, processing, and export of high-quality legumes to the most demanding international markets.

hero.title: Complaints Book

detalle.title: Complaint details
detalle.reclamoDesc: Disagreement related to the purchased product or service.
detalle.quejaDesc: Disagreement not related to the product or service, referring to customer service.
detalle.descripcionPlaceholder: Describe in detail the reason for your claim...
detalle.pedidoPlaceholder: Indicate what solution you expect from the company...

success.title: Complaint registered
success.message: We have sent a copy of your complaint to the registered email address.
success.deadline: In accordance with current regulations, Business Beans Perú SRL will respond to your complaint within a maximum of 15 business days.

reclamaciones.error: Error submitting complaint. Please try again.

general.title: 1. General provisions
general.content: These Terms and Conditions govern access to and use of the Business Beans Perú SRL website. By accessing this site, you agree to be bound by these terms.

services.title: 2. Description of services
services.content: Business Beans Perú SRL is an agro-export company that provides information about its products and export services through this website. This site has an informational and B2B commercial nature.

ip.title: 3. Intellectual property
ip.content: All content on this website, including texts, images, logos and designs, is the property of Business Beans Perú SRL and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws.

privacy.title: 4. Privacy policy
privacy.content: Personal data collected through the forms on this site will be processed in accordance with Law No. 29733, Peru's Personal Data Protection Law, and will be used exclusively to respond to your inquiries.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of liability
liability.content: Business Beans Perú SRL is not responsible for damages arising from the use of information contained on this site. The information presented is for reference purposes and may be subject to change.

law.title: 6. Applicable law
law.content: These terms are governed by Peruvian law. Any dispute will be submitted to the competent courts of the city of Lima, Peru.

contact.title: 7. Contact
contact.content: For any questions about these Terms and Conditions, you may contact us at: info@businessbeans.com
